subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ibna'
subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, unto them that have believed in God and His signs, and who are among those that are in terror [3.5s]... ...And now, concerning thy question regarding the creation of man. Know thou that all men have been created in the nature made by God
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک لآیات الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذینهم آمنوا بالله و آیاته و هم من فزع
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
